task_description: Testing environments activated and configured on PCFS Azure server this week
Genogram (relations) tab in development — Add Connection modal, relationship types, and three-generation family mapping (active on genogram branch)
Current Household view in development — household composition auto-generated from shared addresses and relationships (active on household branch)
Intake workflow module — structured intake creation with mandatory field validation, lifecycle status (Awaiting Approval / Active / Closed), and supervisor assignment
Intake-to-case escalation logic — ability to resolve intake without opening case; intake record links to case when escalated
Automated in-app and email notifications for pending approvals, task assignments, and scheduled supervisor reviews
Case file module — creation, lifecycle management, worker/supervisor assignment, and caseload visibility
Signs of Safety–aligned 13-step practice model — progress tracking, placement decisions, and workflow checklists
Case reassignment with approval chain; historical case and intake visibility per family
Case notes — timestamped entries with role-based locking, audit logging, and Signs of Safety tagging
Supervisory oversight — mandatory face-to-face follow-up tracking, QA automation, and review checklists
Document management across person, intake, and case levels — role-based visibility and long-term encrypted storage
ETL extraction and transformation from FamCare — deduplication and CFSIS field validation rules
Trial migrations in sandbox environment — accuracy verification and data reconciliation against source records
Live migration execution — minimal downtime strategy, parallel running period, and data integrity sign-off
Intake-level emergency support budgets and case-level spending caps with approval thresholds and real-time tracking
Finance-restricted role access, approval workflows, audit logging, and responsive finance form submissions
Sage 300 integration-ready financial data export and two-way alignment for reporting (full API integration in future phase)
Role-based dashboards for workers, supervisors, admin, and finance — task lists, pending approvals, and alert widgets
Custom and automated reporting (weekly / monthly / quarterly) with CFSIS-compliant export and Chief & Council summaries
Address-based search tab — search address fields across existing records and return associated individuals and cases prioritized by open status
Load testing, performance optimization, and security hardening for production scale
Backup, disaster recovery, and production rollout verification against readiness checklist
Staff training documentation and go-live support preparation
